page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 368.0 GB of RAM, which translates to 7.67 GB of memory per core.

The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined 128 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include any local SSD or NVMe storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows a contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core CPU performance is weak, as reflected in stress-ng and single-threaded compression tests. However, multi-core performance is average, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 35,520.27 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 147.7 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is stable, with large block reads at 98.85 GB/sec and writes at 47.39 GB/sec. Redis SET operations reach 33.18 million operations per second.

Given its hardware profile, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that can fully exploit its four GPUs and large memory capacity. It is not cost-effective for CPU-bound or single-threaded tasks. Recommended workloads include deep learning training, parallel scientific simulations, and GPU-accelerated rendering.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 48 dedicated physical cores and 368.0 GB of RAM. It features four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with a total of 128 GB of VRAM, while lacking local storage. Network performance is rated at 16 Gbps baseline. Benchmarks reveal weak single-core CPU performance but average multi-core capabilities, including a stress-ng multi-core score of 35,520.27 and 33.18 million Redis SET operations per second. This instance is optimized for parallel computing, making it suitable for deep learning and scientific simulations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 48 Intel Xeon cores, 368 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 128 GB VRAM, optimized for parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6e-c12g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel Xeon cores, 368 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA V100 GPUs for parallel and GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated platform featuring four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs and 368 GB RAM for parallel computing and deep learning workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 128 GB of total VRAM
48 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
368.0 GB of system memory with 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage
Best-fit workloads include deep learning training and parallel simulations
